episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 333: End of the Russian MTG Era + DMU Rumours
episode.description: Cliff reappears to join James in breaking down all the latest in fast moving card prices, the latest MTGO Modern and Pioneer results, Cards to Watch and a breakdown of the Dominaria United rumours and the cancellation of MTG in Russian, Korean and Traditional Chinese.
